description: Transform AI agents from task-followers into proactive partners that anticipate needs and continuously improve. Now with WAL Protocol, Working Buffer, Autonomous Crons, and battle-tested patterns. Part of the Hal Stack 🦞

description_zh: 为OpenClaw管理OpenRouter免费AI模型，自动按质量排序，配置限流备用方案并更新配置。
name: Free Ride - Unlimited free AI

description: You MUST use this for gathering contexts before any work. This is a Knowledge management for AI agents. Use `brv` to store and retrieve project patterns, dec...
description_zh: 工作前必须使用此工具收集上下文。专为AI代理设计的知识管理工具，使用`brv`存储和检索项目模式...

description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.
description_zh: AI智能体自进化引擎，分析运行时历史识别改进并应用协议约束的进化。

description: Gemini CLI for one-shot Q&A, summaries, and generation.

description: AI-optimized web search using Tavily Search API. Use when you need comprehensive web research, current events lookup, domain-specific search, or AI-generated answer summaries. Tavily is optimized for LLM consumption with clean structured results, answer generation, and raw content extraction. Best for research tasks, news queries, fact-checking, and gathering authoritative sources.
description_zh: 基于Tavily Search API的AI优化搜索。适用于综合研究、时事查询、领域搜索及AI摘要生成。针对LLM优化，提供结构化结果与原始内容提取。适合研究、新闻、事实核查及权威资料收集。
name: Tavily AI Search

description: Enable and configure Moltbot/Clawdbot memory search for persistent context. Use when setting up memory, fixing "goldfish brain," or helping users configure memorySearch in their config. Covers MEMORY.md, daily logs, and vector search setup.
description_zh: 启用并配置 Moltbot/Clawdbot 记忆搜索以实现持久化上下文。用于设置记忆、解决"金鱼脑"问题或配置 memorySearch 参数。涵盖 MEMORY.md、日常日志和向量搜索设置。
name: Memory Setup

description: A self-evolution engine for AI agents. Analyzes runtime history to identify improvements and applies protocol-constrained evolution.
description_zh: AI智能体自进化引擎，分析运行时历史识别改进并应用协议约束进化。
name: Capability Evolver

name: Feishu Evolver Wrapper

description: Persistent memory for AI agents to store facts, learn from actions, recall information, and track entities across sessions.
description_zh: 为AI智能体提供持久记忆，支持跨会话存储事实、学习行为、回忆信息及追踪实体。
name: Agent Memory

description: Multi-source deep research agent. Searches the web, synthesizes findings, and delivers cited reports. No API keys required.

name: Markdown.new Skill

description: ElevenLabs text-to-speech with mac-style say UX.
description_zh: ElevenLabs文本转语音，Mac风格say命令体验

description: Stop waiting for prompts. Keep working.
description_zh: 无需等待提示，持续工作。
name: Agent Autonomy Kit

description: Local memory management for agents. Compression detection, auto-snapshots, and semantic search. Use when agents need to detect compression risk before memory loss, save context snapshots, search historical memories, or track memory usage patterns. Never lose context again.
description_zh: 智能体本地内存管理，支持压缩检测、自动快照与语义搜索。用于预警压缩风险、保存上下文快照、检索历史记忆及追踪使用模式。杜绝上下文丢失。
name: Memory Manager

description: Audit, clean, and optimize Clawdbot's vector memory (LanceDB). Use when memory is bloated with junk, token usage is high from irrelevant auto-recalls, or setting up memory maintenance automation.
description_zh: 审计、清理并优化Clawdbot的向量记忆（LanceDB）。适用于记忆臃肿充斥垃圾、无关自动回忆导致Token消耗过高，或需设置记忆维护自动化时。
name: Memory Hygiene

description: Transcribe audio via OpenAI Audio Transcriptions API (Whisper).
description_zh: 通过 OpenAI Whisper API 转录音频
name: Openai Whisper Api

description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills, requiring Skill tool invocation before ANY response including clarifying questions
description_zh: 在对话开始时使用，确立如何查找和使用技能，要求在任何回复（包括澄清性问题）前调用技能工具
name: Using Superpowers
